name: Vaat Vaat Ma
overview: Vaat Vaat Ma is a romantic tragedy where lovebirds Pahel and Swayam want to get divorced as soon as possible and they hire a divorce lawyer. The story takes a twist when the lawyer comes to the couple's place to get the signatures and then a nationwide lock down is announced.

trailers.title: Vaat Vaat Ma Returns  | Season 2 | Soon On ShemarooMe | Malhar Thakar | Puja Joshi
